vocab.meaning: thay đổi không khí (đi nơi khác để giải tỏa)
vocab.example: Back then, long car rides were the perfect way to get a change of scenery from our dull suburban neighborhood.

vocab.meaning: hồi tưởng lại những kỷ niệm cũ
vocab.example: Thinking about those old family road trips really makes me go down memory lane to a much simpler time.

vocab.meaning: là phần thiết yếu/đặc trưng của cái gì
vocab.example: Getting carsick was part and parcel of my childhood travels, but it didn't stop me from enjoying the view.

vocab.meaning: ở thế chủ động/kiểm soát (nghĩa bóng) hoặc ngồi ghế lái
vocab.example: I used to pretend I was in the driving seat, mimicking my father's movements while we cruised down the highway.

vocab.meaning: quan sát cực kỳ cẩn thận/chăm chú
vocab.example: I would watch the passing landmarks like a hawk, trying to spot the first sign of the beach on our way to the coast.
